summary: Skia update from chrome/m119 to chrome/m132 — a 13-milestone jump. The C API generator fails on the main libSkiaSharp config (Index out of bounds), likely due to new color types or struct changes. Major C API changes: new default font manager shim (sk_default_fontmgr) replacing removed SkFontMgr::RefDefault(), new color types (BGRA_10101010_XR, RGB_F16F16F16X), updated Vulkan structs (GrVkBackendContext field removals, VulkanYcbcrConversionInfo components addition), JPEG encoder options extended with orientation fields, GPU header namespace moves (include/gpu/ → include/gpu/ganesh/), and GrDirectContext factory moves to GrDirectContexts namespace. 31 new DEPS dependencies added (upstream Skia tooling/infra), 9 changed (security-relevant: expat 2.5→2.6.3, libpng, zlib, harfbuzz, brotli, libjpeg-turbo). Companion C# PR updates enum mappings, rewrites SKManagedStream duplicate/fork to use independent copies, removes skia_use_sfntly build flag, and adjusts tests for behavioral changes.
recommendations: Investigate and fix the C# API generator failure (Index out of bounds in libSkiaSharp.json generation) before merging
Verify gr_vk_backendcontext_t struct layout matches C# GrVkBackendContext — fields removed (fMinAPIVersion, fInstanceVersion, fExtensions, fFeatures, fOwnsInstanceAndDevice)
Verify gr_vk_ycbcrconversioninfo_t C# struct includes new fComponents sub-struct (4x uint32 for RGBA component mapping)
Verify sk_jpegencoder_options_t C# struct includes new fOrigin (int32) and fHasOrigin (bool) fields and sizeof static_assert removed
Confirm SkTableMaskFilter and SkShaderMaskFilter deprecation comments don't affect C# API surface
Audit expat 2.5.0→2.6.3 update for CVE coverage (multiple CVEs fixed in 2.6.x series)

generatedFiles.summary: The P/Invoke generator failed for the primary libSkiaSharp.json config with 'Index was outside the bounds of the array'. Skottie, SceneGraph, Resources, and HarfBuzz generation succeeded. The failure likely relates to new color type enum values (BGRA_10101010_XR, RGB_F16F16F16X) or struct layout changes in m132 that the generator doesn't handle. The generated file in the PR cannot be independently verified.
recommendations: Fix the generator to handle m132 header changes and re-run to verify SkiaApi.generated.cs matches
Check if the generator crash is caused by the new color type enum ordering or the modified struct layouts

mismatches.diffSummary: Generator crashed with 'Index was outside the bounds of the array' for libSkiaSharp.json — cannot independently verify the generated file. Skottie, SceneGraph, Resources, and HarfBuzz generation succeeded.

upstreamIntegrity.summary: 22 old fork patches dropped (adopted upstream or replaced by new approach), 2 new fork patches added (dynamic WGL loading, WinRT LoadPackagedLibrary), 18 fork patches changed (adapted to m132 API/build changes). Most dropped patches were upstreamed (skvx const refs, Metal retain, WebGL proc loading) or replaced by the new sk_default_fontmgr shim (SkFontMgr/SkTypeface patches). The remaining changes are primarily build system adaptations (GN configs for iOS architectures, WinRT guards, MSVC toolchain rework, zlib/libwebp build restructuring).
recommendations: Verify the 22 removed patches are genuinely in upstream m132 — spot-check SkBlitter_ARGB32.cpp and GrDirectContext.cpp const ref changes
Review the new GrGLMakeWinInterface.cpp dynamic WGL loading for correctness — static locals in a DLL context may have initialization ordering concerns
Verify the WinRT LoadPackagedLibrary patch properly frees the allocated wchar_t buffer (currently leaks)
Review the zlib BUILD.gn rework carefully — major structural change from modular to integrated build config

added.summary: New fork patch: loads WGL functions (wglGetCurrentContext, wglGetProcAddress) dynamically via GetProcAddress instead of linking directly. Eliminates direct WGL dependency for environments where opengl32.dll functions must be loaded at runtime.
New fork patch: adds SK_BUILD_FOR_WINRT preprocessor guard to use LoadPackagedLibrary (with UTF-8→wide-char conversion) instead of LoadLibraryA for WinRT/UWP builds.

removed.summary: Old fork patch added MakeDefault() static method to SkFontMgr — no longer needed because m132 removed RefDefault() entirely and the C API now uses sk_default_fontmgr shim instead.
Old fork patch added RefDefault() static method to SkTypeface — no longer needed as typeface creation now goes through the default font manager shim.
Old fork patch added a convenience MakeDocument overload (without IXpsOMObjectFactory) and a no-op stub for non-Windows — no longer needed as the C API now handles XPS factory creation directly.

removed.summary: Old fork patch changed lambda/function pointer signatures to use const references (U8x4→const U8x4&) for skvx compatibility — now in upstream m132.
Old fork patch changed lambda parameter to const (skvx::float4→const skvx::float4) — now in upstream m132.
Old fork patch added SkTypeface::RefDefault() with SkOnce singleton — no longer needed as default typeface is managed by sk_default_fontmgr shim.
Old fork patch changed MakeMetal to use retain() instead of reset() for device/queue — now in upstream m132 (API changed).
Old fork patch added eglGetCurrentContext() null check before assembling GL interface — no longer needed, upstream m132 has its own mechanism.
Old fork patch simplified iOS GL interface to use dlsym(RTLD_DEFAULT) — no longer needed, upstream m132 restructured the interface code.
Old fork patch replaced simple dlopen with GLLoader/GLProcGetter classes for macOS GL — no longer needed, upstream m132 restructured GL loading.
Old fork patch replaced manual function table with emscripten_webgl_get_proc_address — now in upstream m132.
Old fork patch replaced simple wglGetProcAddress with AutoLibraryUnload/GLProcGetter classes — replaced by new dynamic WGL loading in added file GrGLMakeWinInterface.cpp.
Old fork patch changed lambda parameter to const reference (U32→const U32&) — now in upstream m132.
Old fork patch increased maxId from 16 to 256 for Tizen fonts (SK_BUILD_FOR_TIZEN guard) — no longer needed in new upstream.
Old fork patch added WinRT LoadPackagedLibrary support — replaced by equivalent patch in tools/library/LoadDynamicLibrary_win.cpp.
Old fork patch added WinRT guard to use hardcoded 'Segoe UI' instead of SystemParametersInfoW — no longer present in m132 (file may have been reorganized).
Old fork patch removed _M_ARM64 exclusion from the build guard — no longer needed in m132.

new file mode 100644

+# Pip checks downloaded package archives against local hashes to protect against remote tampering
+# Read https://pip.pypa.io/en/stable/cli/pip_install/#hash-checking-mode for more information

+jinja2==2.11.3 --hash=sha256:03e47ad063331dd6a3f04a43eddca8a966a26ba0c5b7207a9a9e4e08f1b29419
+# https://github.com/pallets/markupsafe/issues/286
+
+# Multiple hash entries are required for platform dependent distributions.
+# Currently supported hashes by platform in order are: Linux, Intel MacOS, M1 MacOS

changed.summary: Main GN build config — fork patches updated for m132 build system changes. Key differences: source file list updates, removal of SkAnimCodecPlayer, conditional builds for sfntly removal, and updated third-party dependency references.
changed.oldDiff:
diff --git a/BUILD.gn b/BUILD.gn
index 4c2b63a3b5..f49e7986a4 100644
--- a/BUILD.gn
+++ b/BUILD.gn
@@ -1000,16 +1000,14 @@ optional("gpu") {
         "src/gpu/ganesh/gl/glx/GrGLMakeGLXInterface.cpp",
         "src/gpu/ganesh/gl/glx/GrGLMakeNativeInterface_glx.cpp",
       ]
-      libs += [ "GL" ]
+      libs += [ "dl" ]
     } else if (is_mac) {
       sources += [ "src/gpu/ganesh/gl/mac/GrGLMakeNativeInterface_mac.cpp" ]
     } else if (is_ios) {
       sources += [ "src/gpu/ganesh/gl/iOS/GrGLMakeNativeInterface_iOS.cpp" ]
-    } else if (is_win && !skia_enable_winuwp) {
+    } else if (is_win && !is_winrt && !skia_enable_winuwp) {
       sources += [ "src/gpu/ganesh/gl/win/GrGLMakeNativeInterface_win.cpp" ]
-      if (target_cpu != "arm64") {
-        libs += [ "OpenGL32.lib" ]
-      }
+      # GPU is not linked in, but loaded at runtime
     } else {
       sources += [ "src/gpu/ganesh/gl/GrGLMakeNativeInterface_none.cpp" ]
     }
@@ -3519,3 +3517,57 @@ if (skia_build_rust_targets) {
     ]
   }
 }
+
+# SkiaSharp + HarfBuzzSharp
+
+skiasharp_build("SkiaSharp") {
+  public_configs = [ ":skia_public" ]
+  configs += skia_library_configs
+
+  defines = [ "SKIA_C_DLL" ]
+
+  deps = [
+    ":skia",
+    "modules/skottie",
+  ]
+
+  sources = [
+    "src/xamarin/sk_compatpaint.cpp",
+    "src/xamarin/sk_manageddrawable.cpp",
+    "src/xamarin/sk_managedstream.cpp",
+    "src/xamarin/sk_managedtracememorydump.cpp",
+    "src/xamarin/sk_xamarin.cpp",
+    "src/xamarin/SkiaKeeper.c",
+    "src/xamarin/SkCompatPaint.cpp",
+    "src/xamarin/SkManagedDrawable.cpp",
+    "src/xamarin/SkManagedStream.cpp",
+    "src/xamarin/SkManagedTraceMemoryDump.cpp"
+  ]
+
+  libs = []
+}
+
+skiasharp_build("HarfBuzzSharp") {
+  cflags = [
+    "-fno-threadsafe-statics",
+  ]
+
+  defines = [
+    #"HAVE_FREETYPE",
+    #"HAVE_ICU",
+    #"HAVE_ICU_BUILTIN",
+    "HAVE_OT",
+    "HAVE_CONFIG_OVERRIDE_H",

+}

     ]
   }
 }
+

+skiasharp_build("SkiaSharp") {

+  libs = []
+}
+
+skiasharp_build("HarfBuzzSharp") {

+  ]
+

+  sources = [
+    "$_src/harfbuzz-subset.cc",
+  ]
+}

changed.summary: GN build configuration — fork patches for iOS architecture handling (watchOS arm/arm64 variants, arm64e conditional) updated to match m132's changed target_cpu/current_cpu variable naming.
Core GN includes — fork-specific source file additions/removals updated for m132 file reorganization.

changed.summary: Skia GN build target — fork patches updated for m132 include path changes and source list updates.

Toolchain GN config — significant rework: m132 refactored MSVC toolchain from template-based (msvc_toolchain) to direct toolchain definition. Fork patches for WinRT and custom SDK paths adapted to new structure.

interopIntegrity.summary: 2 new interop files added (sk_default_fontmgr shim), 14 files changed, 0 removed, 83 unchanged. The dominant theme is adapting to m132's removal of SkFontMgr::RefDefault() and static SkTypeface factory methods — all font/typeface creation now routes through the new platform-specific default font manager shim. Secondary changes: GPU header namespace reorganization (include/gpu/→include/gpu/ganesh/), Vulkan type renames (GrVkAlloc→skgpu::VulkanAlloc, GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo→skgpu::VulkanYcbcrConversionInfo), GrDirectContext factory namespace move, two new color types, JPEG encoder struct extension, and SkTableMaskFilter/SkShaderMaskFilter deprecation annotations.
recommendations: Verify sk_default_fontmgr cached singleton is thread-safe (uses static local — should be fine with C++11 guarantees)
Confirm gr_vk_backendcontext_t field removal doesn't break existing Vulkan users — 5 fields removed
Check that sk_jpegencoder_options_t sizeof static_assert removal doesn't hide layout mismatches
Verify the ImageDecodeStrategy enum change in skresources is backward-compatible with existing Lottie usage

added.summary: New platform-specific default font manager factory replacing removed SkFontMgr::RefDefault()/MakeDefault(). Provides sk_create_default_fontmgr() (new instance) and sk_get_default_fontmgr() (cached singleton) with platform dispatch: Emscripten→Custom_Embedded, Android→SkFontMgr_New_Android, macOS/iOS→CoreText, Windows→DirectWrite, Linux→FontConfig, fallback→Empty.

Header for the new default font manager shim. Declares sk_create_default_fontmgr(), sk_get_default_fontmgr(), and inline sk_get_default_typeface() helper. These replace the removed SkFontMgr::RefDefault() and SkTypeface::MakeDefault() static methods.
added.diff:
diff --git a/src/c/sk_default_fontmgr.h b/src/c/sk_default_fontmgr.h
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000..265937256a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/c/sk_default_fontmgr.h
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+/*
+ * Copyright 2026 Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
+ *
+ * Use of this source code is governed by a BSD-style license that can be
+ * found in the LICENSE file.
+ */
+
+#ifndef sk_default_fontmgr_DEFINED
+#define sk_default_fontmgr_DEFINED
+
+#include "include/core/SkFontMgr.h"
+#include "include/core/SkFontStyle.h"
+#include "include/core/SkRefCnt.h"
+#include "include/core/SkTypeface.h"
+
+// Creates a new platform-appropriate font manager instance.
+sk_sp<SkFontMgr> sk_create_default_fontmgr();
+
+// Returns a cached, thread-safe, platform-appropriate default font manager.
+sk_sp<SkFontMgr> sk_get_default_fontmgr();
+
+// Returns a default typeface from the cached default font manager.
+inline sk_sp<SkTypeface> sk_get_default_typeface() {
+    return sk_get_default_fontmgr()->legacyMakeTypeface("", SkFontStyle::Normal());
+}
+
+#endif // sk_default_fontmgr_DEFINED

changed.summary: Added two new color type enum values: BGRA_10101010_XR_SK_COLORTYPE and RGB_F16F16F16X_SK_COLORTYPE. Removed fields from gr_vk_backendcontext_t: fMinAPIVersion, fInstanceVersion, fExtensions, fFeatures, fOwnsInstanceAndDevice. Added fComponents sub-struct (r,g,b,a as uint32) to gr_vk_ycbcrconversioninfo_t. Added fOrigin (int32_t) and fHasOrigin (bool) to sk_jpegencoder_options_t.

Updated GPU context factory calls: GrDirectContext::MakeGL→GrDirectContexts::MakeGL, GrDirectContext::MakeVulkan→GrDirectContexts::MakeVulkan. Metal context creation now constructs GrMtlBackendContext explicitly. Added include path updates for ganesh/ subdirectory reorganization (GrGLDirectContext.h, GrVkDirectContext.h, GrMtlDirectContext.h).

XPS document creation now conditionally compiles with SK_BUILD_FOR_WIN guard. Explicitly creates IXpsOMObjectFactory via CoCreateInstance instead of using the convenience overload. Non-Windows builds return nullptr.

changed.summary: All typeface/fontmgr factory methods now route through sk_default_fontmgr instead of static SkTypeface/SkFontMgr methods. sk_typeface_create_default()→sk_get_default_typeface(), sk_typeface_ref_default()→cached static singleton from sk_get_default_typeface(), sk_typeface_create_from_name()→sk_get_default_fontmgr()->legacyMakeTypeface(), sk_typeface_create_from_file/stream/data()→sk_get_default_fontmgr()->makeFrom*(), sk_fontmgr_create_default()→sk_create_default_fontmgr(), sk_fontmgr_ref_default()→sk_get_default_fontmgr().

All GPU header includes updated to ganesh/ subdirectory paths. Vulkan includes changed: GrVkTypes.h→ganesh/vk/GrVkTypes.h, GrVkBackendContext.h→vk/VulkanBackendContext.h. Added Metal includes (GrMtlTypes.h, GrMtlBackendSurface.h). D3D includes moved to ganesh/d3d/ paths. DEF_MAP_WITH_NS macro used for VulkanYcbcrConversionInfo (skgpu namespace). GL/Vulkan/D3D struct mappings wrapped in SK_GANESH/SK_VULKAN/SK_DIRECT3D guards.

+
+
+// Define a mapping between a C++ type and the C type.
+//
+// Usual Values:
+//  - C++  |  SkType   |  SkSomeType
+//  - C    |  sk_type  |  sk_some_type_t
+//  - Map  |  Name     |  ToSomeType / AsSomeType
+//
+#define DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, Declaration, Ns)        \
+    Declaration;                                                    \
+    static inline const Ns::SkType& As##Name(const sk_type& t) {    \
+        return reinterpret_cast<const Ns::SkType&>(t);              \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline const Ns::SkType* As##Name(const sk_type* t) {    \
+        return reinterpret_cast<const Ns::SkType*>(t);              \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline Ns::SkType& As##Name(sk_type& t) {                \
+        return reinterpret_cast<Ns::SkType&>(t);                    \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline Ns::SkType* As##Name(sk_type* t) {                \
+        return reinterpret_cast<Ns::SkType*>(t);                    \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline const sk_type& To##Name(const Ns::SkType& t) {    \
+        return reinterpret_cast<const sk_type&>(t);                 \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline const sk_type* To##Name(const Ns::SkType* t) {    \
+        return reinterpret_cast<const sk_type*>(t);                 \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline sk_type& To##Name(Ns::SkType& t) {                \
+        return reinterpret_cast<sk_type&>(t);                       \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline sk_type* To##Name(Ns::SkType* t) {                \
+        return reinterpret_cast<sk_type*>(t);                       \
+    }
+
+#define DEF_CLASS_MAP(SkType, sk_type, Name)                   \
+    DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, class SkType, )
+
+#define DEF_CLASS_MAP_WITH_NS(Ns, SkType, sk_type, Name)       \
+    DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, class SkType, Ns)
+
+#define DEF_STRUCT_MAP(SkType, sk_type, Name)                  \
+    DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, struct SkType, )
+
+#define DEF_MAP(SkType, sk_type, Name)                         \
+    DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, ,)
+
+#define DEF_MAP_WITH_NS(Ns, SkType, sk_type, Name)             \
+    DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, , Ns)
+

+#include "include/core/SkMatrix.h"
+static inline SkMatrix AsMatrix(const sk_matrix_t* matrix) {
+    return SkMatrix::MakeAll(
+        matrix->scaleX, matrix->skewX,  matrix->transX,
+        matrix->skewY,  matrix->scaleY, matrix->transY,
+        matrix->persp0, matrix->persp1, matrix->persp2);
+}
+static inline sk_matrix_t ToMatrix(const SkMatrix* matrix) {
+    sk_matrix_t m;
+    m.scaleX = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMScaleX);
+    m.skewX  = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMSkewX);
+    m.transX = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMTransX);
+    m.skewY  = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMSkewY);
+    m.scaleY = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMScaleY);
+    m.transY = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMTransY);
+    m.persp0 = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMPersp0);
+    m.persp1 = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMPersp1);
+    m.persp2 = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMPersp2);
+    return m;
+}
+static inline sk_matrix_t ToMatrix(const SkMatrix& matrix) {
+    sk_matrix_t m;
+    m.scaleX = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMScaleX);
+    m.skewX  = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMSkewX);
+    m.transX = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMTransX);
+    m.skewY  = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMSkewY);
+    m.scaleY = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMScaleY);
+    m.transY = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMTransY);
+    m.persp0 = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMPersp0);
+    m.persp1 = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMPersp1);
+    m.persp2 = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMPersp2);
+    return m;
+}
+
+#include "include/core/SkImageInfo.h"
+static inline SkImageInfo AsImageInfo(const sk_imageinfo_t* info) {
+    return SkImageInfo::Make(
+        info->width,
+        info->height,
+        (SkColorType)info->colorType,
+        (SkAlphaType)info->alphaType,
+        sk_ref_sp(AsColorSpace(info->colorspace))); 
+}
+static inline sk_imageinfo_t ToImageInfo(const SkImageInfo info) {
+    return {
+        ToColorSpace(info.refColorSpace().release()),
+        info.width(),
+        info.height(),
+        (sk_colortype_t)info.colorType(),
+        (sk_alphatype_t)info.alphaType(),
+    };
+}
+static inline const SkImageInfo* ToImageInfo(const sk_imageinfo_t* cinfo) {
+    return reinterpret_cast<const SkImageInfo*>(cinfo);
+}
+static inline sk_imageinfo_t* AsImageInfo(SkImageInfo* info) {
+    return reinterpret_cast<sk_imageinfo_t*>(info);
+}

+    return {
+        (SkGlyphID*)runbuffer->glyphs,
+        (SkScalar*)runbuffer->pos,
+        (char*)runbuffer->utf8text,
+        (uint32_t*)runbuffer->clusters,
+    };
+}
+static inline sk_textblob_builder_runbuffer_t ToTextBlobBuilderRunBuffer(const SkTextBlobBuilder::RunBuffer runbuffer) {
+    return {
+        runbuffer.glyphs,
+        runbuffer.pos,
+        runbuffer.utf8text,
+        runbuffer.clusters,
+    };
+}

+#include "include/docs/SkPDFDocument.h"
+DEF_MAP(SkPDF::DateTime, sk_document_pdf_datetime_t, TimeDateTime)
+static inline SkPDF::DateTime AsDocumentOptionalTimestamp(const sk_document_pdf_datetime_t* datetime) {
+    if (datetime) {
+        return *AsTimeDateTime(datetime);
+    } else {
+        return SkPDF::DateTime();
+    }
+}
+static inline SkString AsDocumentOptionalString(const sk_string_t* skstring) {
+    if (skstring) {
+        return *AsString(skstring);
+    } else {
+        return SkString();
+    }
+}
+static inline SkPDF::Metadata AsDocumentPDFMetadata(const sk_document_pdf_metadata_t* metadata) {
+    SkPDF::Metadata md;
+    md.fTitle = AsDocumentOptionalString(metadata->fTitle);
+    md.fAuthor = AsDocumentOptionalString(metadata->fAuthor);
+    md.fSubject = AsDocumentOptionalString(metadata->fSubject);
+    md.fKeywords = AsDocumentOptionalString(metadata->fKeywords);
+    md.fCreator = AsDocumentOptionalString(metadata->fCreator);
+    md.fProducer = AsDocumentOptionalString(metadata->fProducer);
+    md.fCreation = AsDocumentOptionalTimestamp(metadata->fCreation);
+    md.fModified = AsDocumentOptionalTimestamp(metadata->fModified);
+    md.fRasterDPI = metadata->fRasterDPI;
+    md.fPDFA = metadata->fPDFA;
+    md.fEncodingQuality = metadata->fEncodingQuality;
+    return md;
+}

+#if defined(SK_GANESH)
+// GPU specific
+
+static inline GrContextOptions AsGrContextOptions(const gr_context_options_t* options) {
+    GrContextOptions opts;
+    opts.fAllowPathMaskCaching = options->fAllowPathMaskCaching;
+    opts.fAvoidStencilBuffers = options->fAvoidStencilBuffers;
+    opts.fBufferMapThreshold = options->fBufferMapThreshold;
+    opts.fDoManualMipmapping = options->fDoManualMipmapping;
+    opts.fGlyphCacheTextureMaximumBytes = options->fGlyphCacheTextureMaximumBytes;
+    opts.fRuntimeProgramCacheSize = options->fRuntimeProgramCacheSize;
+    return opts;
+}
+
+#if defined(SK_VULKAN)
+#define DEF_MAP_VK(VkType, vk_type)                 \
+    static inline VkType As##VkType(vk_type* t) {   \
+        return reinterpret_cast<VkType>(t);         \
+    }                                               \
+    static inline vk_type* To##VkType(VkType t) {   \
+        return reinterpret_cast<vk_type*>(t);       \
+    }
+
+DEF_MAP_VK(VkInstance, vk_instance_t);
+DEF_MAP_VK(VkDevice, vk_device_t);
+DEF_MAP_VK(VkPhysicalDevice, vk_physical_device_t);
+DEF_MAP_VK(VkQueue, vk_queue_t);
+DEF_MAP(VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures, vk_physical_device_features_t, VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures);
+DEF_MAP(VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures2, vk_physical_device_features_2_t, VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures2);
+DEF_MAP_WITH_NS(skgpu, VulkanMemoryAllocator, gr_vk_memory_allocator_t, GrVkMemoryAllocator);
+DEF_MAP_WITH_NS(skgpu, VulkanExtensions, gr_vk_extensions_t, GrVkExtensions)
+
+static inline GrVkBackendContext AsGrVkBackendContext(const gr_vk_backendcontext_t* context) {
+    GrVkBackendContext ctx;
+    ctx.fInstance = AsVkInstance(context->fInstance);
+    ctx.fPhysicalDevice = AsVkPhysicalDevice(context->fPhysicalDevice);
+    ctx.fDevice = AsVkDevice(context->fDevice);
+    ctx.fQueue = AsVkQueue(context->fQueue);
+    ctx.fGraphicsQueueIndex = context->fGraphicsQueueIndex;
+    ctx.fMinAPIVersion = context->fMinAPIVersion;
+    ctx.fInstanceVersion = context->fInstanceVersion;
+    ctx.fMaxAPIVersion = context->fMaxAPIVersion;
+    ctx.fExtensions = context->fExtensions;
+    ctx.fVkExtensions = AsGrVkExtensions(context->fVkExtensions);
+    ctx.fFeatures = context->fFeatures;
+    ctx.fDeviceFeatures = AsVkPhysicalDeviceFeatures(context->fDeviceFeatures);
+    ctx.fDeviceFeatures2 = AsVkPhysicalDeviceFeatures2(context->fDeviceFeatures2);
+    ctx.fMemoryAllocator = sk_ref_sp(AsGrVkMemoryAllocator(context->fMemoryAllocator));
+    if (context->fGetProc != nullptr) {
+        ctx.fGetProc = [context](const char* name, VkInstance instance, VkDevice device) -> PFN_vkVoidFunction {
+            return context->fGetProc(context->fGetProcUserData, name, ToVkInstance(instance), ToVkDevice(device));
+        };
+    }
+    ctx.fOwnsInstanceAndDevice = context->fOwnsInstanceAndDevice;
+    ctx.fProtectedContext = context->fProtectedContext ? GrProtected::kYes : GrProtected::kNo;
+    return ctx;
+}
+

+}

+// Define a mapping between a C++ type and the C type.
+//
+// Usual Values:
+//  - C++  |  SkType   |  SkSomeType
+//  - C    |  sk_type  |  sk_some_type_t
+//  - Map  |  Name     |  ToSomeType / AsSomeType
+//
+#define DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, Declaration, Ns)        \
+    Declaration;                                                    \
+    static inline const Ns::SkType& As##Name(const sk_type& t) {    \
+        return reinterpret_cast<const Ns::SkType&>(t);              \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline const Ns::SkType* As##Name(const sk_type* t) {    \
+        return reinterpret_cast<const Ns::SkType*>(t);              \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline Ns::SkType& As##Name(sk_type& t) {                \
+        return reinterpret_cast<Ns::SkType&>(t);                    \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline Ns::SkType* As##Name(sk_type* t) {                \
+        return reinterpret_cast<Ns::SkType*>(t);                    \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline const sk_type& To##Name(const Ns::SkType& t) {    \
+        return reinterpret_cast<const sk_type&>(t);                 \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline const sk_type* To##Name(const Ns::SkType* t) {    \
+        return reinterpret_cast<const sk_type*>(t);                 \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline sk_type& To##Name(Ns::SkType& t) {                \
+        return reinterpret_cast<sk_type&>(t);                       \
+    }                                                               \
+    static inline sk_type* To##Name(Ns::SkType* t) {                \
+        return reinterpret_cast<sk_type*>(t);                       \
+    }
+
+#define DEF_CLASS_MAP(SkType, sk_type, Name)                   \
+    DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, class SkType, )
+
+#define DEF_CLASS_MAP_WITH_NS(Ns, SkType, sk_type, Name)       \
+    DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, class SkType, Ns)
+
+#define DEF_STRUCT_MAP(SkType, sk_type, Name)                  \
+    DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, struct SkType, )
+
+#define DEF_MAP(SkType, sk_type, Name)                         \
+    DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, ,)
+
+#define DEF_MAP_WITH_NS(Ns, SkType, sk_type, Name)             \
+    DEF_MAP_DECL(SkType, sk_type, Name, , Ns)

+#include "include/core/SkMatrix.h"
+static inline SkMatrix AsMatrix(const sk_matrix_t* matrix) {
+    return SkMatrix::MakeAll(
+        matrix->scaleX, matrix->skewX,  matrix->transX,
+        matrix->skewY,  matrix->scaleY, matrix->transY,
+        matrix->persp0, matrix->persp1, matrix->persp2);
+}
+static inline sk_matrix_t ToMatrix(const SkMatrix* matrix) {
+    sk_matrix_t m;
+    m.scaleX = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMScaleX);
+    m.skewX  = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMSkewX);
+    m.transX = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMTransX);
+    m.skewY  = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMSkewY);
+    m.scaleY = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMScaleY);
+    m.transY = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMTransY);
+    m.persp0 = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMPersp0);
+    m.persp1 = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMPersp1);
+    m.persp2 = matrix->get(SkMatrix::kMPersp2);
+    return m;
+}
+static inline sk_matrix_t ToMatrix(const SkMatrix& matrix) {
+    sk_matrix_t m;
+    m.scaleX = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMScaleX);
+    m.skewX  = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMSkewX);
+    m.transX = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMTransX);
+    m.skewY  = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMSkewY);
+    m.scaleY = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMScaleY);
+    m.transY = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMTransY);
+    m.persp0 = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMPersp0);
+    m.persp1 = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMPersp1);
+    m.persp2 = matrix.get(SkMatrix::kMPersp2);
+    return m;
+}

+}

+    md.fCreator = AsDocumentOptionalString(metadata->fCreator);
+    md.fProducer = AsDocumentOptionalString(metadata->fProducer);
+    md.fCreation = AsDocumentOptionalTimestamp(metadata->fCreation);
+    md.fModified = AsDocumentOptionalTimestamp(metadata->fModified);
+    md.fRasterDPI = metadata->fRasterDPI;

+}

+    }                                               \
+    static inline vk_type* To##VkType(VkType t) {   \
+        return reinterpret_cast<vk_type*>(t);       \
+    }
+
+DEF_MAP_VK(VkInstance, vk_instance_t);
+DEF_MAP_VK(VkDevice, vk_device_t);
+DEF_MAP_VK(VkPhysicalDevice, vk_physical_device_t);
+DEF_MAP_VK(VkQueue, vk_queue_t);
+DEF_MAP(VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures, vk_physical_device_features_t, VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures);
+DEF_MAP(VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures2, vk_physical_device_features_2_t, VkPhysicalDeviceFeatures2);
+DEF_MAP_WITH_NS(skgpu, VulkanMemoryAllocator, gr_vk_memory_allocator_t, GrVkMemoryAllocator);
+DEF_MAP_WITH_NS(skgpu, VulkanExtensions, gr_vk_extensions_t, GrVkExtensions)
+
+static inline skgpu::VulkanBackendContext AsGrVkBackendContext(const gr_vk_backendcontext_t* context) {
+    skgpu::VulkanBackendContext ctx;
+    ctx.fInstance = AsVkInstance(context->fInstance);
+    ctx.fPhysicalDevice = AsVkPhysicalDevice(context->fPhysicalDevice);
+    ctx.fDevice = AsVkDevice(context->fDevice);
+    ctx.fQueue = AsVkQueue(context->fQueue);
+    ctx.fGraphicsQueueIndex = context->fGraphicsQueueIndex;
+    ctx.fMaxAPIVersion = context->fMaxAPIVersion;
+    ctx.fVkExtensions = AsGrVkExtensions(context->fVkExtensions);
+    ctx.fDeviceFeatures = AsVkPhysicalDeviceFeatures(context->fDeviceFeatures);
+    ctx.fDeviceFeatures2 = AsVkPhysicalDeviceFeatures2(context->fDeviceFeatures2);
+    ctx.fMemoryAllocator = sk_ref_sp(AsGrVkMemoryAllocator(context->fMemoryAllocator));
+    if (context->fGetProc != nullptr) {
+        ctx.fGetProc = [context](const char* name, VkInstance instance, VkDevice device) -> PFN_vkVoidFunction {
+            return context->fGetProc(context->fGetProcUserData, name, ToVkInstance(instance), ToVkDevice(device));
+        };
+    }
+    ctx.fProtectedContext = context->fProtectedContext ? skgpu::Protected::kYes : skgpu::Protected::kNo;
+    return ctx;
+}

changed.summary: FileResourceProvider::Make and DataURIResourceProviderProxy::Make now use skresources::ImageDecodeStrategy enum (kPreDecode/kLazyDecode) instead of bool predecode parameter.
SkCompatPaint constructor now initializes SkFont with sk_get_default_typeface() instead of default-constructing SkFont — required because m132 removed SkFont's implicit default typeface.

depsAudit.summary: 31 new dependencies added (mostly upstream Skia tooling/infrastructure: dawn, angle2, highway, perfetto, etc.), 9 existing dependencies updated (brotli, expat, harfbuzz, libjpeg-turbo, libpng, spirv-cross, vulkan-headers, vulkanmemoryallocator, zlib), 8 unchanged. Most new dependencies are Skia infrastructure/tooling that SkiaSharp doesn't build or ship. The security-relevant changes are in the 9 updated libraries, particularly expat (CVE fixes in 2.6.x series) and libpng.
recommendations: Verify expat update covers known CVEs (CVE-2024-45490, CVE-2024-45491, CVE-2024-45492 in 2.6.x)
Confirm libpng, zlib, and libjpeg-turbo updates don't introduce breaking changes to SkiaSharp's build
Most of the 31 new deps are upstream-only tooling — verify SkiaSharp's build only pulls the 8+9 it actually needs

added.name: abseil-cpp
added.summary: Google's C++ utility library — new upstream Skia dependency for string utilities, synchronization, etc.

added.name: angle2
added.summary: Google's ANGLE OpenGL ES implementation — used for GPU testing and cross-platform GL.

added.name: dawn
added.summary: Google's WebGPU implementation — new GPU backend in upstream Skia.

added.name: egl-registry
added.summary: Khronos EGL API registry headers.

added.name: emsdk
added.summary: Emscripten SDK for WebAssembly builds.

added.name: highway
added.summary: Google's SIMD library — replaces some hand-rolled SIMD in Skia.

added.name: icu
added.summary: International Components for Unicode — text processing.

added.name: icu4x
added.summary: Rust-based Unicode library — newer ICU alternative.

added.name: imgui
added.summary: Dear ImGui — debug UI for Skia viewer/debugger tools.

added.name: jinja2
added.summary: Python template engine — used for code generation.

added.name: libavif
added.summary: AVIF image codec library.

added.name: libgav1
added.summary: AV1 video decoder — used by libavif.

added.name: libgrapheme
added.summary: Unicode grapheme cluster library.

added.name: libjxl
added.summary: JPEG XL codec library.

added.name: libyuv
added.summary: YUV conversion library.

added.name: markupsafe
added.summary: Python HTML escaping — jinja2 dependency.

added.name: microhttpd
added.summary: Minimal HTTP server — testing infrastructure.

added.name: oboe
added.summary: Google's Android audio library — not relevant to SkiaSharp.

added.name: opengl-registry
added.summary: Khronos OpenGL API registry headers.

added.name: partition_alloc
added.summary: Chromium memory allocator — build infrastructure dependency.

added.name: perfetto
added.summary: System tracing framework — profiling/debugging.

added.name: skia-infra
added.summary: Skia infrastructure/build tooling.

added.name: spirv-headers
added.summary: SPIRV shader language headers — GPU shader compilation.

added.name: spirv-tools
added.summary: SPIRV shader tools — GPU shader validation/optimization.

added.name: swiftshader
added.summary: Software GPU renderer — used for testing without hardware GPU.

added.name: task_drivers
added.summary: Skia CI task driver scripts — infrastructure only.

added.name: unicodetools
added.summary: Unicode tools — text processing infrastructure.

added.name: vello
added.summary: GPU 2D renderer (experimental) — research dependency.

added.name: vulkan-deps
added.summary: Vulkan dependency aggregator.

added.name: vulkan-tools
added.summary: Khronos Vulkan validation/debug tools.

added.name: vulkan-utility-libraries
added.summary: Khronos Vulkan utility libraries.

changed.name: brotli
changed.summary: Brotli compression library version bump — adds prefix.c source file referenced in updated BUILD.gn.

changed.name: expat
changed.summary: libexpat XML parser updated from ~2.5.0 era to ~2.6.3 era. Security-relevant: expat 2.6.x fixes multiple CVEs including XML parsing vulnerabilities.

changed.name: harfbuzz
changed.summary: HarfBuzz text shaping library version bump. Used by SkiaSharp for text layout.

changed.name: libjpeg-turbo
changed.summary: JPEG codec version bump. Used for JPEG encoding/decoding in SkiaSharp.

changed.name: libpng
changed.summary: PNG library version bump. Used for PNG encoding/decoding in SkiaSharp.

changed.name: spirv-cross
changed.summary: SPIR-V shader cross-compiler — GPU pipeline dependency.

changed.name: vulkan-headers
changed.summary: Vulkan API headers update — required for Vulkan backend compatibility.

changed.name: vulkanmemoryallocator
changed.summary: AMD Vulkan Memory Allocator update — GPU memory management.

changed.name: zlib
changed.summary: zlib compression library version bump. Used throughout Skia for data compression. BUILD.gn significantly restructured.

findings.finding: [new_api] Two new SKColorType enum values (Bgra10101010Xr=25, RgbF16F16F16x=26) with correct bytes-per-pixel (8), components (3), and alpha type mappings.
[changed_api] SKJpegEncoderOptions struct extended with fOrigin (int) and fHasOrigin (bool) fields. Must match native sk_jpegencoder_options_t layout.
[new_api] Bi-directional enum conversion added for Bgra10101010Xr and RgbF16F16F16x color types.
[new_api] GL sized format returns 0 for both new color types — correct as they have no GL backend representation.

[changed_api] Major rewrite: Duplicate/Fork create independent MemoryStream copies via ReadStreamFully(). Removes parent/child WeakReference chain. Original stream remains readable after duplicate. Duplicated streams use weak:false to prevent GC.
[changed_api] Added private protected constructor with 'weak' parameter controlling whether native holds weak or strong reference to support duplicate behavior.
[other] BOM removal only. No functional change.
[platform_specific] Removed skia_use_sfntly=false — sfntly removed from Skia m132. Same across all 8 platform build scripts.
[changed_api] Tests updated for new color types and Gray8 precision change (0xFF353535 to 0xFF363636).
[changed_api] Stream tests rewritten for new Duplicate/Fork semantics: removed InvalidOperationException expectations, verified both remain readable, removed platform-specific skip attributes.
[changed_api] SKData reference count expectations changed from 3 to 2 after FromEncodedData.
[changed_api] Reference count assertions relaxed from exact (4) to range (expected to expected+1).
[platform_specific] MatchFamily test uses DefaultFontFamily instead of hardcoded 'Times New Roman'. GCStillCollectsTypeface restricted to Windows.
[changed_api] Typeface file loading test updated for m132 woff2 behavior: tolerates empty FamilyName.
[changed_api] Same woff2 typeface handling change as SKFontTest.
[other] Version bump: milestone 119 to 132, soname 119.0.0 to 132.0.0, assembly 3.119.0.0 to 3.132.0.0, nugets 3.119.4 to 3.132.0.
[other] New changelog documenting API additions and behavioral changes for m132.
[other] Generator script improved: continues on per-config failure instead of exiting, reports all failures at end.
